title: Totem OffHander
description: you know how auto totem is a hack this fixes it by not making it auto totem, basically you press "U" and the mod puts a totem in your offhand from your inventory
body: This mod makes it so when you press U on your keyboard it puts a totem in your OffHand from your inventory. it does not count as a cheat because your are not using auto totem you are just using hotkeys which is allowed
